title: 🔥宏观风险压制反弹高度
body: 市场处于筑底修复期。BMRI 读数 78（RISK_OFF），表明宏观流动性环境未改善。受油价下跌影响，BTC 价格 7 日回升 4.4% 至 74,347 美元，但仍处于 200 日定投成本 86,327 美元下方，偏离达 13.9%。资金在强阻力区前依然谨慎。降息预期是否已过度交易？
body_en: The market is in a bottoming and repair phase. BMRI sits at 78 (RISK_OFF), signaling that macro liquidity conditions haven't improved. BTC rebounded 4.4% over the last 7 days to $74,347, helped by falling oil prices, but it still trades 13.9% below the 200-day DCA cost of $86,327. Capital remains cautious ahead of strong resistance. Have rate cut expectations been over-traded?
